allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\redbl\\every-seoul-backend" -Recurse -Force | Select-Object -Property FullName, PSIsContainer | Sort-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { $_ | Select-Object @{Name='Path'; Expression={$_.FullName.Substring\(33\) + '\\'}} } else { $_ | Select-Object @{Name='Path'; Expression={$_.FullName.Substring\(33\)}} } })
